name: ExtensionAppointment_RecurrenceId
title: R5: The sequence number in the recurrence (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Appointment.recurrenceId` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Appointment.recurrenceId` 0..1 `positiveInt`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Appointment.recurrenceId` 0..1 `positiveInt`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Appointment.recurrenceId` has a context of Appointment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Appointment`.
Element `Appointment.recurrenceId` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The sequence number in the recurrence (new)
element.comment:
Element `Appointment.recurrenceId` has a context of Appointment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Appointment`.

element.short: The sequence number in the recurrence
element.definition: The sequence number that identifies a specific appointment in a recurring pattern.
